initiator_prompt: [Task] Analyze requirements and recommend product modality.
[Important] Use Write tool to create files. Use Bash tool to run commands.
[Result] When agreed on modality, output: <result>Modality</result>
[Context] {context}
DemandAnalysis.context:
Task: {task}

Options:
- Image: charts, graphs
- Document: .docx files
- PowerPoint: .pptx files
- Excel: .xlsx files
- PDF: .pdf files
- Website: .html files
- Application: Python software, tools
- Dashboard: real-time panels
- Mind Map: idea maps

initiator_prompt: [Task] Recommend the best programming language for this project.
[Important] Consider modality, project complexity, and maintainability.
[Result] When agreed on language, output: <result>Language</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Implement the software according to requirements.
[Important] Use Write tool for code files. Use Bash tool for testing.
[Result] When implementation is complete and verified, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Design decorative images for the GUI.
[Important] Create images that match the application theme.
[Result] When design is complete, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Integrate designed images into GUI code.

[Important] Use self.* to avoid garbage collection:
self.image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(Image.open("./image.png").resize((50, 50)))
[Result] When images are integrated, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Implement methods in unimplemented files.
[Important] Fill in all TODO or pass statements.
[Result] When all methods are implemented, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Review code and identify issues.

[Standards]
1. All classes imported correctly
2. All methods implemented
3. Necessary comments present
4. No potential bugs
5. Conforms to requirements
6. Logic is sound
[Result] When all issues are identified, output: <result>Issues found</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Modify code based on review comments.
[Important] Fix all issues identified in the review.
[Result] When modifications are complete and verified, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Analyze test reports and summarize bugs.
[Important] Categorize bugs by severity and type.
[Result] When analysis is complete, output: <result>N bugs found</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Fix bugs based on test reports.
[Important] Run tests after fixing to verify all pass.
[Result] When all bugs are fixed and tests pass, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Create requirements.txt for project dependencies.

[Example]
numpy>=1.19.2
pandas>=1.1.4
[Result] When file is created and verified, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
[Task] Create a user manual in Markdown format.

[Include]
- Software introduction
- Installation instructions
- Feature descriptions
- User guide
[Result] When manual is complete and verified, output: <result>Done</result>
[Context] {context}
